ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( !$Setup.leaseworks__LeaseWorksSettings__c.leaseworks__Disable_All_Triggers__c, NOT(ISNEW()), OR(ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Period_Start_Date__c), ISCHANGED(leaseworks__Period_End_Date__c )), OR( ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Aircraft MR'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Rent'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Interest'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Non MR'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Deferred - Rent'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Deferred - MR'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'HL/SL-Rent'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'HL/SL-MR'), ISPICKVAL( leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c , 'Fee') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Unable to save changes. Editing of the Period Start Date/Period End Date is restricted for Rent, Aircraft MR, Interest, Non-MR, Fee, HL/SL (Rent/MR) and Deferred (Rent/MR) categories, as they are automatically generated by the system
